title: Decadent Dutch Pancakes
description: A rich and indulgent brunch recipe for fluffy, golden pancakes.
instructions: In a small bowl, combine yeast and warm milk. Let sit for 5 minutes until frothy.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and cocoa powder.
Add eggs, melted butter, and yeast mixture to dry ingredients. Stir until combined.
The batter should be smooth and free of lumps. Let rest for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Grease with butter.
Drop 1/4 cupfuls of batter onto skillet or griddle. Cook for 2-3 minutes until bubbles appear.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings.
